category_sources: source_facts.description says Rockcraft creates OCI images; official Ubuntu Rockcraft docs describe it as a tool for secure, stable OCI-compliant container images.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rockcraft; official docs title is Rockcraft documentation.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official Ubuntu Rockcraft documentation; official docs page is the dedicated documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/canonical/rockcraft, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies OCI image creation; official Rockcraft docs describe Ubuntu-based OCI-compliant container images; source_facts.executables lists the CLI executable.
